name: unboxing
description: 택배 조회·배송 추적 앱 (Expo + Cloudflare Worker)

scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix app run typecheck && npm --prefix worker run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix app test && npm --prefix worker test && npm run test:harness
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix app install && npm --prefix worker install
